description: Graphic. The central image is a glossy yellow hardshell rolling suitcase with black corner guards and spinner wheels, standing on a reflective dark tiled floor beside a floor-to-ceiling window. Through the window, a yellow passenger jet is parked on the tarmac in daylight. The color palette is gold and yellow against blue-gray tones. Large display typography on the right reads 'Leave' in bold gold, 'on your' and 'terms' in white, with 'OWN' in bold white, so the headline reads 'Leave on your OWN terms.' A dark navy footer bar runs along the bottom containing the DHS/ICE seal, the 'ICE' wordmark, and the text 'Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation.'
notable_text: Leave on your OWN terms. Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation
